---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or device support
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like?**
Describe the feature or device you'd like supported.

**Diagnostics file**
If this is about an unsupported device type, please attach your diagnostics export:
**Settings → Devices & Services → xComfort Bridge → ⋮ → Download diagnostics**

**Additional context**
Anything else — screenshots, links to device specs, etc.
